zh.Reynel, Haute-Marne, France: 法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內雷恩爾
zh.Champagne, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法國阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel於大約1145年出生在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內雷恩爾時，他的父親Arnould De Reynel I37歲，母親Hodiarde De Vignory17歲。他於大約1170年與Ermengarde De Brienne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel于大约1145年出生在法国德 艾斯特豪-馬內雷恩爾时，他的父亲Arnould De Reynel I37岁，母亲Hodiarde De Vignory17岁。他于大约1170年与Ermengarde De Brienne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from Rein, a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name beginning with ragin ‘counsel, advice’.

nameMeanings.name: Guyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gard
meanings: Probably connected with the Old Norse word garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’. It was borne in Old Norse mythology by a beautiful goddess who was the wife of Frey; originally a goddess of fertility.

nameMeanings.name: ou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Louis   or, less commonly,   Louise .

variants.name: Louisa
meanings: feminine form of   Louis  , commonly used as an English given name since the 18th century.

variants.name: Louise
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: Wyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally an occupational name from Old English weard ‘guardian, watchman’.

en.lifeSummary: When Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel was born about 1145, in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Arnould De Reynel I, was 37 and his mother, Hodiarde De Vignory, was 17. He married Ermengarde De Brienne about 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1204, in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel est né environ 1145, à Reynel, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Arnould De Reynel I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hodiarde De Vignory, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde De Brienne environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1204, à Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel um 1145 in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnould De Reynel I 37 und seine Mutter Hodiarde De Vignory 17. Er hat um 1170 Ermengarde De Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel è nato il circa 1145 nel Reynel, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Arnould De Reynel I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Hodiarde De Vignory, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde De Brienne circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1204, nel Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Reynel, Haute-Marne, France: フランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンレイネル
ja.Champagne, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: フランスアクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアイン

ja.Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne,: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネル
ja.lifeSummary: Guyard ou Wyard de Reynelが約1145年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンレイネルで生まれた時，父Arnould De Reynel Iは37歳，母Hodiarde De Vignoryは17歳であった。約1170年にErmengarde De Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel(이)가 대략 1145년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 리넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnould De Reynel I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Hodiarde De Vignory(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 Ermengarde De Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 리넬에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Reynel, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Arnould De Reynel I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hodiarde De Vignory, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde De Brienne aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel родился около 1145 г. в местности ринель, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Arnould De Reynel I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hodiarde De Vignory, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde De Brienne около 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности ринель, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guyard ou Wyard de Reynel nació aproximadamente 1145, en Reynel, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Arnould De Reynel I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hodiarde De Vignory, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ermengarde De Brienne aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1204, en Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
